message:
fix(cli): call set_budget_skip in explain mode handler

Wire up the TraceCollector::set_budget_skip() method in handle_explain()
to propagate the skipped_due_to_budget flag from evaluation results to
the explain trace output.

This completes the budget-skip tracking chain:
1. Evaluator sets result.skipped_due_to_budget when budget exhausted
2. handle_explain() calls collector.set_budget_skip(result.skipped_due_to_budget)
3. TraceCollector stores the value (added in previous commit)
4. finish() outputs to ExplainTrace for JSON/human display

Without this call, the TraceCollector would always report false for
skipped_due_to_budget even when the evaluator detected a budget overrun.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
